CICI Lombard Elevate is an unlimited health insurance plan that provides unlimited sum insured options and access to an infinite claim amount with the Infinite Care benefit. Also, this comes with unlimited restoration of the sum insured with the Reset benefit. In this video, we will discuss the 5 main USPs of the plans, features, waiting periods, and discounts available in the ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan.
